global.positioning: World of Mixologists reveals the cocktail world. Bartendly structures it.

hero.kicker: A flagship platform for cocktail culture
hero.title: A global view of cocktail culture
hero.subtitle: Real people. Real places. Real stories.
hero.statement: No rankings. No pay-to-play. No artificial systems.
hero.panelText: WØM creates visibility, storytelling and cultural authority. Bartendly turns that visibility into structure, discovery, event history, connection and long-term ecosystem value.
hero.fact1Text: Places worth discovering, remembering and returning to.
hero.fact2Text: Bartenders, creators, founders and hospitality professionals.
hero.fact3Text: Guest shifts, launches, cities, scenes and stories.
hero.fact4Text: Visibility today. Structure, tools and opportunity tomorrow.

about.title: A premium editorial platform for the people, places and moments that make hospitality worth caring about.
about.intro: World of Mixologists exists to document, highlight and support what actually matters in hospitality: bartenders, bars, creators, guest shifts, concepts, cities and experiences that create real desire, memory and return value.
about.card1Title: A living global view of cocktail culture
about.card1Text: WØM captures bars, guest shifts, creators, hospitality scenes and city energy as a curated editorial layer — not noise, not a database without soul, but a point of view.
about.card2Title: Real places. Real people. Real experiences.
about.card2Text: We highlight bars and professionals because they create something worth feeling, remembering and revisiting — not because they bought visibility or fit a mechanical scoring system.
about.card3Text: The hospitality world deserves visibility that feels human, credible and desirable. Too much attention is captured by systems that are paid, artificial, limited or disconnected from the emotional reality of going out. WØM exists to show the bars, the people and the moments that create true hospitality value.
about.card4Text: Innovation, creativity, generosity, atmosphere, fun, social energy, strong identity, memorable hospitality and places where people genuinely enjoy their time. We show what actually matters in hospitality — the people, the places and the moments that make you come back.

difference.title: Not a ranking. Not a paid badge. Not an artificial authority machine.
difference.intro: World of Mixologists exists alongside the broader cocktail ecosystem, but it stands on a fundamentally different philosophy: not rank, not scarcity for prestige, not paid legitimacy — but relevance, desirability and return value.
difference.item1: Not ranked. Hospitality is not reduced to a rigid ladder.
difference.item2: Not limited in number. Great places are not valid only because they fit a quota.
difference.item3: Not paid visibility. Editorial legitimacy is not for sale.
difference.item4: Not algorithm-driven. Hospitality is human, emotional and social before it is measurable.
difference.item5: Not only about perfect luxury codes. Some places matter because they feel alive, generous, magnetic and unforgettable.
difference.quote: We do not ask only whether a place looks right. We ask whether it makes people want to return.
difference.quoteText: That is the logic behind the WØM Selection: a badge designed to coexist with ecosystem markers like 50 Best or Top 500 while standing for something else entirely — atmosphere, feeling, fun, people, experience, memory, social energy and desire.

selection.title: The WØM Selection
selection.text1: The WØM Selection is for bars worth discovering and worth returning to. It can exist alongside known industry badges, but it is built on a different foundation.
selection.text2: It is not ranked. It is not capped. It is not bought. It is not limited to bars that simply tick expected boxes. It is about places where atmosphere, people, experience and memory create a genuine reason to come back.
selection.quote: A place you don’t just visit — a place you come back to.
selection.criteriaTitle: What the badge can stand for
selection.criteriaText: The goal is not to imitate existing authority systems. The goal is to highlight bars that genuinely matter to the people who live, work and go out in this world. Some are elegant. Some are wild. Some are iconic. Some are deeply local. What matters is that they create return value.

discover.title: A richer and more human map of the cocktail world.
discover.intro: World of Mixologists reveals not just names, but context — the bars, events, guest shifts, bartenders, cities, creators and hospitality moments that shape culture and make people want to go out.
discover.card1Text: Places with identity, atmosphere, social energy and return value — not just names on a list.
discover.card2Text: Takeovers, launches, collaborations and nights worth planning around.
discover.card3Text: The people whose energy, style and generosity shape the experience.
discover.card4Text: Cocktail culture is local, social and alive. WØM makes that visible.
discover.card5Text: Not just information, but narrative value for the bars, professionals and moments that deserve to be seen properly.

bridge.title: From visibility to ecosystem
bridge.intro: This is one of the main pillars of the page and the logic must be explicit: World of Mixologists reveals the cocktail world. Bartendly structures it.
bridge.leftText: WØM is where the scene becomes visible. It creates desirability, context and cultural credibility around bars, people, places and experiences.
bridge.leftItem1: Visibility: bars, people and moments are seen in the right way.
bridge.leftItem2: Storytelling: hospitality gets narrative value, not just exposure.
bridge.leftItem3: Discovery: professionals and enthusiasts can find what matters.
bridge.leftItem4: Amplification: launches, identities and city moments gain reach and meaning.
bridge.rightTitle: Structure, tools, connection and long-term ecosystem value.
bridge.rightText: Bartendly is the platform layer that can turn visibility into action. It enables discovery, event tracking, guest shift exploration, bartender presence, venue history, brand connection and richer future services.
bridge.rightItem1: Discover where to go tonight: bars and activity become easier to explore.
bridge.rightItem2: Track events and guest shifts: visibility becomes structured discovery.
bridge.rightItem3: Build bartender presence: identity, history and opportunities grow over time.
bridge.rightItem4: Connect bars, brands and people: the ecosystem becomes navigable and useful.

professionals.title: One page. One ecosystem. Clear value for bartenders, bars and brands.
professionals.intro: No separate microsites. No scattered logic. WØM creates visibility. Bartendly creates structure. Together, they create stronger presence and better opportunities for the people building hospitality.
professionals.card1Item1: Visibility: be seen through credible cultural storytelling, not empty self-promotion.
professionals.card1Item2: Identity: build presence around your work, style, events and history.
professionals.card1Item3: Opportunities: connect to bars, projects, brands, services and future ecosystem value.
professionals.card2Item1: Exposure: gain premium visibility that feels curated, desirable and real.
professionals.card2Item2: Event promotion: launches, guest shifts and programming become easier to surface.
professionals.card2Item3: Presence: build long-term discoverability and history through Bartendly.
professionals.card3Item1: Activation: connect campaigns to the right people, places and hospitality moments.
professionals.card3Item2: Content: create visibility around launches, concepts and experiences.
professionals.card3Item3: Audience: reach a real cocktail and hospitality community through culture, not generic advertising.

services.title: Curated opportunities and premium services around hospitality visibility and execution.
services.intro: This layer must feel selective and coherent, not like a random agency menu. The logic is simple: use credibility, cultural visibility and real hospitality understanding to support meaningful projects.
services.card1Text: Premium brand visibility built through the right bars, the right moments and the right hospitality context.
services.card2Text: Editorial-style exposure around launches, initiatives, concepts and hospitality stories worth amplifying.
services.card3Title: Bar features, launches and new menus
services.card3Text: Selective support for bars, openings, concepts and menu evolutions through strong cultural visibility.
services.card4Text: Support for collaborations, takeovers and event concepts that need both curation and operational understanding.
services.card5Title: Bar consultancy through a network of professionals
services.card5Text: Selective hospitality support through trusted professionals for concept thinking, direction and targeted advisory work.
services.card6Text: Coaching and performance support for hospitality professionals who want stronger energy, presence and consistency.
services.sideText: A dedicated coaching layer for hospitality professionals, with a focus on fitness, nutrition and performance. Because the way you feel, move and sustain energy matters in this industry.

experiences.title: Need bartenders for your event?
experiences.intro: Bartendly Experiences is the service layer for curated bartending support, especially for trade shows, brand activations and corporate events. It should feel focused, premium and execution-driven.

instagram.title: The live authority and distribution layer of the scene.
instagram.intro: Instagram is where hospitality visibility moves fast: guest shifts, city moments, bars, creators and the pulse of cocktail culture. WØM uses it as a real editorial distribution engine, not just as a feed block.
instagram.tile1Text: What is happening now, tonight and next.
instagram.tile2Text: Places with identity, atmosphere and return value.
instagram.tile4Text: The pulse of cocktail culture worldwide.

final.eyebrow: See the scene. Build with us.
final.title: See the scene. Explore the platform. Build with us.
final.text: World of Mixologists reveals the cocktail world. Bartendly structures it. Follow WØM for visibility and discovery. Explore Bartendly for structure, tools and ecosystem value. Contact us if you want to create something meaningful in hospitality.

footer.copy: All rights reserved. Visibility with meaning. Structure with purpose.
